basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) Enumerators Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tanuvas.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the TANUVAS Enumerators Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: The upper age limit is 5 years in case of women/ SC/ST/OBC.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TANUVAS Enumerators Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TANUVAS Enumerators Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TANUVAS Enumerators recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 08 July 2026. There is no separate application deadline before the walk-in.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Enumerators post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in any discipline to be eligible for the Enumerators position at TANUVAS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Enumerators post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Enumerators post is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Enumerators position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Enumerators post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Enumerators post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Enumerators position by the Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TANUVAS Enumerators recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Enumerators post will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for TANUVAS Enumerators recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Enumerators positions are contractual in nature, meaning the employment is for a fixed period as per the project requirements.
